name: cpig-kin-09-full-bicycle-animated
description: kin-09 Full bicycle animated — extends kin-08 (single skeleton snapshot) with body-binding + a stop-motion strip. Forward-dynamics integrates 2s of pedal-torque rolling; five Pose at Step components sample steps 0/500/1000/1500/2000; Pose Bound Bodies flattens them into a tree of bound geometry so the viewport renders all five bikes simultaneously, spread left-to-right along world +X. Exercises rolling_contact (4.6.C) + chain_drive (4.6.A) together AND verifies body-binding survives multi-pose flattening. Phase 4.6.F.1 animated-mechanism demo.

setup.vlmDescription: A stop-motion strip of five hardtail mountain bicycles arranged left-to-right along the world +X axis, each frozen at a different time-step of a 2-second forward-dynamics roll under 5 N·m pedal torque. The leftmost (step 0) sits near the world origin; the rightmost (step 2000) has rolled ~4 m forward; intermediate poses (500 / 1000 / 1500) fill in between, each at a recognisable diamond-frame profile with two 350 mm cylindrical wheels, tubes ~20 mm radius, and a small vertical crank. Wheel rotation is visible across the strip (the rear wheel spins at crank_rpm × chain_ratio 2.5). A faint design-pose skeleton (frame triads + joint circles + pivot points) is overlaid at the origin via Preview Diagram in Display Mode 2.
